title: 'Don't mean to negotiate at any cost': Iran rules out second round of US talks as ceasefire deadline nears
summary_full: Iran has hardened its stance on US talks, stating negotiations will not occur "at any cost." This comes as the US threatens severe action if a deal isn't reached. Tehran emphasizes that diplomacy is linked to military posture and depends on national interests and constructive feedback from the US.
